title: Medical device shortage: 3100B disposables ship kit - Canada.ca
content:
## Medical device shortage: 3100B disposables ship kit
The 3100B disposables ship kit  is currently reported as a medical device shortage under sections 62.21 to  62.26 of the Medical Devices Regulations. For a full list of shortages, refer to the List  of shortages and discontinuations .
Posted on 2022-08-10 Footnote 1
Actual medical device shortage
3100B disposables ship kit
Vyaire Medical, Inc.
26125 North Riverwoods Blvd Mettawa, IL USA 60045
Increase in demand for the medical device
This date reflects when a shortage  report is first posted online. This page includes specific information related  to the device that is in shortage. Updates to the status and end date of a  shortage can be found on the List of shortages webpage.
